name: Data & AI Services
description: Enterprise data platform services including data lake and lakehouse architecture, data governance and cataloging, analytics and BI modernization, and AI/ML operationalization. Helps enterprises build governed, sovereign data foundations and deploy AI use cases responsibly.
positioning: Sovereign data infrastructure with AI enablement. Positioned at the intersection of cloud platform expertise and European data governance requirements, particularly relevant as EU AI Act compliance becomes mandatory.
competitive_moat: Sovereign data residency options, EU AI Act compliance expertise, integration with sovereign cloud stack
